en: Don't you think I sound like shit? No, it's good.
Can we try it again? Sure, yep. Sure, it's your money.
Sounds a lot better. We need to get experimental.
Try bouncing us left and right for the ah-ahs.
Now, dead centre for the last. And blast it!
Do we have time to stack a few more? The studio opens at 8, so we've got 30 more minutes.
